supportLevel: Unofficial public Microsoft Fabric status mirror based on HTML scraping

active.detailsHtml: Fabric customers in the India Central, Brazil South, Southeast Asia, and UK South regions may experience issues loading Activator artifacts. Engineers are investigating the issue, and updates will be provided soon.
active.detailsText: Fabric customers in the India Central, Brazil South, Southeast Asia, and UK South regions may experience issues loading Activator artifacts. Engineers are investigating the issue, and updates will be provided soon.
